name: User adds various types of comments on the video and another user is able to view those comments
fullName: User adds/replies/deletes comments on the video: User adds various types of comments on the video and another user is able to view those comments

steps.name: And user logs in as "pragati.chauhan@kpoint.com" with password "admin_password"
When user navigates to "Videos" section of Explore
And user "plays" the entity "video with all artifacts" from Explore "Videos" using Filter "Recent"
And user adds the following comments to the video
And user logs in as "cucuser10@kpoint.com" with password "admin_password"
When user navigates to "Videos" section of Explore
And user "plays" the entity "video with all artifacts" from Explore "Videos" using Filter "Recent"
Then user verifies the following comments on the video

labels.name: feature
labels.value: User adds/replies/deletes comments on the video
